title: Israel — Application for Registration of a Company (Form 1 / טופס 1)
description: The Israeli Corporations Authority's (Ministry of Justice) Form 1 (טופס 1, Regulation 1), 'Application for Registration of a Company', filed with the Registrar of Companies under section 8 of the Companies Law, 5759-1999. Opens Israel's Business Formation vertical (2 of 6, combined with the already-modelled Taxes vertical, `il/tax-authority/1301-personal-details`). Scoped to the simplest coherent pathway: a single natural-person founder who is simultaneously the company's sole initial applicant/shareholder, filing a private company limited by shares with one class of shares. Out of scope: a corporate (rather than natural-person) founder, multiple founders/shareholders (the form's own shareholder-declaration block and share-allocation table are open, many-row repeating structures; GovSchema's array/repeating-group proposal, GSP-0009, is not yet part of the accepted v0.3 specification, so this version models exactly one shareholder rather than fabricating a row cap), multiple distinct share classes (the form's own share-capital table is likewise a repeating table, collapsed here to one class), and the ambiguous single-checkbox row referencing section 175 of the Companies Law (a source-extraction artifact left this row's own heading text partially garbled in the underlying .doc file; rather than fabricate its meaning, it is disclosed here as an unresolved gap for a future review with cleaner source access). This document describes the form only; it does not submit anything on the founder's behalf, and does not imply endorsement by the State of Israel, the Ministry of Justice, or the Israeli Corporations Authority. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the State of Israel.

authority.name: Registrar of Companies, Israeli Corporations Authority (Ministry of Justice)

source.documentRef: Form 1 (טופס 1, תקנה 1), "Application for Registration of a Company" (בקשה לרישום חברה), filed under section 8 of the Companies Law, 5759-1999

verification.notes: GOV-3087 'GovSchema Standard Research' cycle. This candidate was pre-scouted and left as disclosed, ready-to-author backlog by the prior GOV-3078 cycle (which opened Israel's Business Formation, Passport, and Visa verticals as strong leads but deferred authoring given that cycle's one-cycle budget already spent on Nepal), and independently re-fetched and re-verified from scratch this cycle rather than trusted as-is. Direct `curl` fetch (no login/CAPTCHA gate on this BlobFolder URL, though the `gov.il` service landing page is Cloudflare-gated): HTTP 200, content-length 441,856 bytes, sha256 `302bb540d3c970d7fe9bd5f53f03221ee6ebbfdb334fc55cb2e808b3c9feada5`. Magic-byte check (`D0 CF 11 E0 A1 B1 1A E1`) confirms a genuine legacy OLE/CFB Word .doc (not .docx, not a renamed HTML/mislabeled file — a distinct pitfall this registry has previously hit, see `sl/bnr.wp.gov.lk` mismatched-content precedent). Extracted via the `word-extractor` npm package's `getBody()` API, which recovers the document's full run of table cells and paragraph text in document order (including every FORMTEXT placeholder as a literal blank run); no bookmark/FFData (interactive form-field name/tooltip) extraction API is exposed by this library for legacy binary .doc, so field identity and scope were derived from the adjacent label text and table structure the extracted body itself carries (each block below quotes its own governing Hebrew label verbatim in `sourceRef`), the same label-proximity technique already established in this registry for other non-AcroForm/flat sources. Reading the extracted body end to end confirms Form 1's own structure: proposed company name (up to 3, priority order); the founder/applicant's identity and address (natural-person path only — the form's alternative corporate-founder path, 'שם התאגיד / מס' תאגיד', is out of scope for this version); the company's proposed registered-office address; optional company email/phone; two attachment checkboxes (signed Articles of Association, first directors' fitness declaration); a four-option company-purpose block under section 32 of the Law; three paired restriction/no-restriction checkbox blocks (share-transfer restriction, public-offering prohibition, 50-shareholder-cap, each 'mark the applicable alternative and detail the governing articles sections' per the form's own instruction); registered and allocated share-capital blocks (collapsed from the form's own open share-type and shareholder tables to one share class / one shareholder, matching this registry's established convention — see `pk/secp/company-incorporation-single-member-company`'s identical single-subscriber collapse of a wide, many-row source table — for the same GSP-0009 reason); shareholder-liability election (limited by shares, or unlimited with a professional/other-company description); legal-action-limitation and signing-rights disclosure; General Manager identity; the section-39 authorized-reporting-officer identity; the founder's own first-shareholder sworn declaration (including the form's own non-Israeli-ID-holder passport disclosure, modelled as a genuine boolean gate — 'האם החותם בעל ת"ז ישראלית' is the real either/or distinction the form's own prose draws, unlike cases elsewhere in this registry where a conditional was disclosed rather than invented for lack of a real gate); and the certifying attorney's own identity and certification declaration (mandatory on every filing under this form, not optional — modelled as always-required fields/document, not gated behind a paid-preparer-style boolean, since the form provides no alternative unwitnessed pathway). One row (heading text approximating 'הוראות בתקנון לפי סעיף 175 לחוק', referencing a balance-sheet-attachment exemption contingent on the three restriction checkboxes above) came back from `word-extractor` with a garbled, partially duplicated heading fragment ('הור הוב הוראות...') that could not be confidently reconstructed into a single unambiguous field; disclosed above as an out-of-scope gap rather than guessed at, consistent with this registry's precision-over-fabrication convention. `documents[]` (5 entries) models the two attachment checkboxes as `supporting-evidence` (the fitness declaration is itself a distinct standalone document this form only references by title, not a statement this form itself states verbatim), the founder's own sworn first-shareholder declaration and the certifying attorney's own certification as `attestation` entries with statement text quoted verbatim from the extracted body, and the non-Israeli-ID passport copy as an `identity-document` entry gated on `founderHasIsraeliId`. 2 valid mock scenarios (a limited-by-shares single-founder company with no-par-value shares; an unlimited professional company with par-value shares and a non-Israeli-ID founder) plus 5 mutation-control fixtures (a missing statically-required field, a missing conditional field while `shareTransferRestricted` is true, a missing conditional field while `founderHasIsraeliId` is false, a missing required document, an invalid `shareholderLiabilityType` enum value) are committed under `conformance/il/corporations-authority/company-registration-form-1/1.0.0/`. An ephemeral, from-scratch conformance checker (deriving required/requiredWhen rules directly from this schema's own fields[]/documents[], discarded after use, not committed) ran all 7: both valid scenarios at 0 errors, all 5 mutation controls each raising exactly 1 error, and confirmed every requiredWhen field/document reference resolves (0 dangling references). Validated clean with `node tools/validate.mjs` and `node tools/validate-ajv.mjs`, individually and as part of the full registry run.

fields.name: companyPurposeDetail
fields.label: פירוט
fields.description: Detail supporting the chosen purpose type: the excluded businesses (per §32(2)), the specified businesses (per §32(3)), or the public purposes (per the fourth option), as applicable. Not required when the company adopts the unrestricted §32(1) pathway, which the form itself leaves undetailed.
fields.sourceRef: "מטרות החברה" block, options 2-4's own blank detail lines

documents.label: עותק תקנון חתום בידי בעל/י המניות הראשונים
documents.sourceRef: "ומצרף בזה: עותק תקנון חתום בידי בעל/י המניות הראשונים ומאומת כאמור בסעיף 23 (ב) לחוק"

documents.label: הצהרת הדירקטורים הראשונים על נכונותם לכהן כדירקטורים
documents.sourceRef: "ומצרף בזה: ... הצהרת הדירקטורים הראשונים על נכונותם לכהן כדירקטורים"

documents.label: הצהרת בעל מניות ראשון
documents.statement: אני הח"מ, לאחר שהוזהרתי כחוק כי עלי לומר את האמת וכי אהיה צפוי לעונשים הקבועים בחוק אם לא אעשה כן, מצהיר בזאת כלהלן: לגבי יחיד: אני כשיר לייסד חברה ולהחזיק מניות בה ואיני מוגבל על פי דין, ובכלל זה לפי פקודת פשיטת הרגל [נוסח חדש] התש"ם-1980, לפי חוק ההוצאה לפועל, התשכ"ז-1967, לפי חוק חדלות פירעון ושיקום כלכלי, התשע"ח-2018, ולפי סעיף 7 לחוק.
documents.sourceRef: "הצהרת בעלי מניות ראשונים" — "נוסח הצהרת בעלי המניות הראשונים"

documents.label: העתק מאושר של הדרכון (למי שאינו בעל ת"ז ישראלית)
documents.sourceRef: "...ויצורף לטופס זה העתק מאושר כאמור בתקנה 16 לתקנות החברות (דיווח, פרטי רישום וטפסים), התש"ס-1999"

documents.label: אישור עורך הדין
documents.statement: אני עורך הדין מאשר בזה כי המוכר/ת לי אישית או שזיהה/תה עצמו/ה בפניי בתעודת זהות שמספרה [...], לאחר שהזהרתיו/ה כי עליו/ה להצהיר את האמת וכי יהיה/תהיה צפוי/ה לעונשים בחוק אם לא יעשה/תעשה כן, אישר/ה את נכונות הצהרתו/ה דלעיל, לרבות בדבר היותו מוסמך לחתום בשם התאגיד (אם הבקשה מוגשת על ידי תאגיד), וחתם/ה עליה בפניי.
